Open review

Corrections and Evidence Requests

How to report an error, source conflict or missing piece of Division lore evidence.

Open a lore correction report

What to include

Identify the page and exact claim, explain the correction, and provide the strongest available source with a timestamp, page, chapter, mission, collectible or game-build locator.

Conflicting evidence is recorded as disputed until it can be responsibly resolved. Reports are not treated as verified merely because they are plausible or widely repeated.

Unofficial, source-led research into The Division universe and its real-world influences.
